transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my air handler keeps short cycling and it's getting bad! This is Angela Reed at 1500 Sunset Blvd. Dispatcher: Okay Angela, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 1500 Sunset Blvd right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: air handler keeps short cycling
